ideas.title: Charge Relay
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.one_liner: Tap nodes in the correct order to relay electricity across a grid before the charge fizzles — one wrong tap and the whole circuit shorts.

ideas.title: Fuse Network
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.one_liner: Bombs are counting down across a fuse network — tap to cut and redirect fuses so explosions miss your base.

ideas.title: Tile Alchemy
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.one_liner: Merge adjacent element tiles by tapping pairs — valid combinations create powerful new elements, wrong combos spawn toxic tiles that spread.

ideas.title: Gravity Well
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.one_liner: Tap to place temporary gravity wells that pull a drifting astronaut through deadly debris fields to reach the space station.

ideas.title: Catalyst Queue
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.one_liner: Chemical compounds march toward the reactor — tap the right catalyst to neutralize each one, but wrong choices trigger chain reactions.

ideas.title: Vending Machine Surgeon
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.one_liner: Tilt your phone to dislodge stuck snacks from a cursed vending machine without jamming everything else.

ideas.title: WiFi Signal Quest
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.one_liner: Drag yourself through a house blueprint hunting the WiFi sweet spot while walls, microwaves, and neighbors sabotage your signal.

ideas.title: Bubble Wrap Strategist
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.one_liner: Pop bubble wrap to complete target patterns — but each pop shifts neighbors, turning satisfying pops into a cascading spatial puzzle.

ideas.title: Aquarium Architect
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.one_liner: Place fish in a tank following hidden compatibility rules — put the wrong neighbors together and watch the food chain unfold.

ideas.title: Suitcase Tetris Rush
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.one_liner: Pack oddly shaped items into your suitcase before your flight — but TSA rules ban certain item combos.

ideas.title: Traffic Light Conductor
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.one_liner: Control every traffic light at an increasingly chaotic intersection — one wrong green and cars collide spectacularly.

ideas.title: Signal Scramble
ideas.creator: trendsetter
ideas.one_liner: Unscramble garbled emoji codes by swapping pairs before the signal drops.

ideas.title: Grid Quarantine
ideas.creator: trendsetter
ideas.one_liner: Build walls to contain spreading infections before they reach the grid edges.

ideas.title: Chain Reaction Planner
ideas.creator: trendsetter
ideas.one_liner: Place bombs strategically to trigger the perfect chain reaction and clear the numbered grid.

ideas.title: Gravity Flip Maze
ideas.creator: trendsetter
ideas.one_liner: Flip gravity in four directions to slide a ball through procedurally generated mazes.

ideas.title: Shadow Match
ideas.creator: trendsetter
ideas.one_liner: Drag and rotate pieces to fill shadow silhouettes before time runs out.

ideas.title: Domino Forecast
ideas.creator: puzzler
ideas.one_liner: Predict the chain reaction before you trigger it — place dominoes, draw your forecast path, then watch if reality matches your brain.

ideas.title: Equation Snake
ideas.creator: puzzler
ideas.one_liner: Your snake's body IS the equation — slither through numbers and operators to hit the target.

ideas.title: Gravity Architect
ideas.creator: puzzler
ideas.one_liner: Draw gravity arrows, release the ball, and pray your plan works — one shot to collect every star.

ideas.title: Liar's Grid
ideas.creator: puzzler
ideas.one_liner: Every tile claims something about its neighbors — but some tiles LIE. Find the liars using pure logic.

ideas.title: Rule Thief
ideas.creator: puzzler
ideas.one_liner: The rules are hidden. Make moves, observe what's legal, deduce the secret rule — then exploit it before it changes.

ideas.title: Rule Roulette
ideas.creator: visionary
ideas.one_liner: The rules of the game change every 10 seconds — survive the chaos or die trying.

ideas.title: Shrink Think
ideas.creator: visionary
ideas.one_liner: The play area shrinks every second — rearrange the blocks before there's no room left.

ideas.title: Déjà Vu
ideas.creator: visionary
ideas.one_liner: Two identical games play side by side — find the one where the PHYSICS is broken.

ideas.title: Cause & Defect
ideas.creator: visionary
ideas.one_liner: A Rube Goldberg machine is breaking — trace the chaos back to its CAUSE and fix it before everything explodes.

ideas.title: Trust Fall
ideas.creator: visionary
ideas.one_liner: One tap, two characters, opposite directions — keep them BOTH alive.

ideas.title: Sabotage Chef
ideas.creator: visionary
ideas.one_liner: Sabotage the recipe WITHOUT the judge catching you — sneak in wrong ingredients while acting normal.
